summary: A Fox News split-screen interview (Dana Perino with DHS Spokeswoman Tricia McLaughlin) about the murder of a 13-year-old boy by an illegal immigrant soccer coach, attacking sanctuary-city policies, with an inset LAPD mugshot. It is a talking-head news interview, not a stylized or music-driven produced piece, so it is out of scope.
notable_text: TRICIA MCLAUGHLIN | DHS SPOKESWOMAN; ILLEGAL IMMIGRANT CHARGED WITH TEEN'S MURDER IN CA; FOX NEWS ALERT
